title: Telegram Channel Capability Conformance
objective: Import the selected OpenClaw runtime's packaged Telegram message adapter, drive it through a deterministic platform shim, and prove Telegram's declared channel atoms plus shared workflow cases without live Telegram credentials.

phases.title: Provision Runtime Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw environment without starting the gateway so Kova can import the packaged Telegram adapter from the release-shaped artifact.

phases.title: Run Telegram Adapter Send Mapping Proof
phases.intent: Import Telegram's real packaged message adapter and prove only the adapter send mapping rows that can be exercised without a running Telegram platform receive path.

phases.title: Run Telegram Runtime Workflow Conformance
phases.intent: Run OpenClaw with its real Telegram adapter against a local Telegram Bot API shim, inject normal Telegram user updates, and verify shared workflow rows from observed Telegram sends and provider evidence.
evidence: thread, reply, media, duplicate, and self-trigger invariants
